action_set_definitions.name: search_executive_by_role
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the organizational directory for an executive based on their role description and returns their unique employee ID.

role_keyword.description: The specific role or title to search for (e.g., 'senior revenue leadership').

action_set_definitions.name: get_onboarding_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of an employee's onboarding process, including phase, documentation, provisioning, and alignment scores.

action_set_definitions.name: update_compliance_record
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the system to reflect the completion of specific mandatory onboarding protocols or document submissions.

requirement_type.description: The type of compliance requirement being fulfilled.

action_set_definitions.name: configure_mnpi_access
action_set_definitions.description: Enables or restricts access to Material Non-Public Information (MNPI).

access_granted.description: True to grant access, False to restrict.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_integration_milestone
action_set_definitions.description: Logs the completion of specific integration activities like Early Wins or Assimilation sessions.

milestone_type.description: The type of milestone being recorded.

details.description: Brief description of the milestone achievement.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_stakeholder_alignment
action_set_definitions.description: Improves the Stakeholder Alignment Score (SAS) through targeted interventions and meetings.

action_set_definitions.name: set_restructuring_lock
action_set_definitions.description: Enforces a policy block on organizational restructuring for a specific employee context to prevent 'Organ Rejection'.

lock_active.description: Whether to engage the restructuring restriction.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_onboarding
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the employee to the 'active' phase of their employment once all criteria are met.

state_description.employee_id: Unique identifier for the employee currently being onboarded.
state_description.onboarding_phase: The current stage of the process: 'pre_boarding', 'documentation', 'provisioning', 'active'.
state_description.completed_documents: A list of document types successfully submitted and verified (e.g., 'NDA', 'Tax_Form').
state_description.it_provisioning_status: Status of hardware and software setup, including 'laptop', 'email_account', and 'badge'.
state_description.background_check_passed: Indicates if the mandatory background verification is complete.
